rawIntent: Add a new help icon in the main screen that pops up a tooltip to describe the application to end user

successCriteria.description: A help icon is visible on the main screen and displays a tooltip with application description when clicked.

constraints: Every state-changing operation produces an audit record.
RBAC enforced at middleware, never inline.
Input validated at the API boundary.
outOfScope: Changes to other screens or components not mentioned in the intent.
Styling or design changes beyond the tooltip functionality.
